global.title: 1,000 curbside EV chargers are coming to Philadelphia
global.summary: Philadelphia is gearing up for a major buildout of curbside EV chargers. more…

global.title: Kia’s EV bet is paying off as sales surge with new models launching

global.title: Toyota announces new hydrogen collab with Nikola fueling spinoff
global.summary: Toyota and Nikola fueling station spinoff Hyroad have announced that they’re joining farces forces to scale hydrogen-powered transportation with integrated fueling, vehicles, and logistics support throughout Southern California. more…

global.title: Trump just blocked 165 US wind projects – here’s what’s behind it
global.summary: The Trump administration has effectively frozen 165 new onshore wind farm developments in the US, leaving the projects on private land in limbo, the Financial Times reported yesterday. Combined, they represent around 30 gigawatts of electric generating capacity. more…

global.title: BYD’s flagship electric SUV receives 30,000+ orders in 24 hrs, and its starts at under $40K
global.summary: The stunning three-row electric SUV can drive up to 590 miles (950 km) and is equipped with BYD’s new 5-minute Flash Charging. more…

global.title: Tesla Semi can save over $400K vs diesel, but there are big ‘ifs’
global.summary: With the Tesla Semi now rolling off the high-volume production line at a qupted price of $290,000 for the 500-mile version, we ran a full total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis against a comparable diesel Class 8 truck. global.title: Nivalis buys SolarEdge, paving the way for solar powered reefer trailers in the US
global.summary: Nivalis Energy has already established itself as a pioneer in the electric refrigerated trailer space, and their acquisition of the SolarEdge e-Mobility business is going to help them pull ahead even further – with the power of the sun! more…

global.title: E-quipment highlight: New Holland E25X electric excavator
global.summary: New Holland Construction released its first battery-powered mini excavator, the E15X, all the way back in 2023 – but enough of you called CNH to tell them your loads were just too big for the E15X. global.title: Ford is offering employee pricing and free EV chargers after sales crash again in April
global.summary: After reporting that US sales dropped for a fourth consecutive month in April from last year, Ford is bringing back employee pricing and free EV chargers in its latest push. more…
